items.title: Oil prices surge after strikes kill Iran’s supreme leader, tankers hit near Strait of Hormuz
items.description: Oil prices surged late Sunday with Brent crude briefly hitting $82.37, amid growing fears of Middle East supply disruptions as the Iran conflict escal...

items.title: Jack Dorsey cuts nearly half of Block workforce amid major AI overhaul
items.description: Block announces massive layoffs affecting over 4,000 jobs as the payments company pivots to AI-driven operations under CEO Jack Dorsey's leadership.

items.title: Netflix follows Warren Buffett's playbook: Don't overpay, walk away
items.description: Netflix quickly exits Warner Bros. Discovery bidding war, declining to match Paramount Skydance's offer after just over an hour of consideration.

items.title: The 'off-price' boom: Retail giant announces $2.5B buyback as discount shopping surges
items.description: While department stores struggle, off-price retailers like TJ Maxx, Marshalls and HomeGoods are booming as Americans shop selectively on their own aff...

items.title: Spirit Airlines reaches deal to exit bankruptcy proceedings by early summer
